title: GetMobileDeviceAccessOverrideRequest

allOf.description: The WorkMail organization to which you want to apply the override.

Identifies the WorkMail user for the override. Accepts the following types of user identities:

  • User ID: 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012 or S-1-1-12-1234567890-123456789-123456789-1234

  • Email address: user@domain.tld

  • User name: user
The mobile device to which the override applies. DeviceId is case insensitive.

description: GetMobileDeviceAccessOverrideRequest schema from Amazon WorkMail API
